title: blocking hook (exit 2) beats allow Write(*) -> DENIED, recorded in permission_denials; stderr message is fed back to the model

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $CASE_DIR/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: 『hook で締める』exit-code 経路: allow Write(*) で許諾済みでも、exit 2 の blocking hook が勝って Write は実行されない(permissions docs: "A blocking hook also takes precedence over allow rules. A hook that exits with code 2 stops the tool call before permission rules are evaluated")。hook は発火し(marker)、stderr の文言がモデルに返る(hooks docs: exit 2 = blocking error, stderr is fed back to the model)。
notes: MEASURED-DESIGN 2026-07-05: scratch 探索で hook block は permission_denials に記録されると確認(P9 GAPS G4 の懸念は解消)— probe=permission の denials 判定がそのまま使える。expected.permission は観測面の deny(headless DENIED / sdk DENIED_HARD)だが、遮断の機構は規則 deny ではなく hook block(exit 2)。JSON deny 経路(exit 0 + permissionDecision=deny)は c で対にする。
